holdings.infoBox: RFG is an equity ETF with a total of 98 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 3.33%, DigitalOcean Holdings at 2.75%, Carpenter Technology at 2.43%, TTM Technologies at 2.38%, and Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals at 2.21%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Midcap 400 Pure Growth ETF (RFG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 Pure Growth index. The fund tracks a factor-weighted index of the S&P 400 companies exhibiting the strongest growth factors. RFG was launched on Mar 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
